Frequently Asked Questions
❓
Are the prayer times accurate?
Times are approximate for Abuja. Use Auto Abuja mode in Prayer Times for daily accurate times from AlAdhan.com, or set your mosque's exact times manually.
›
❓
How do I install this as an app?
On Android: Open in Chrome → tap 3 dots menu → "Add to Home Screen". On iPhone: Open in Safari → tap Share button → "Add to Home Screen".
›
❓
How do I suggest a mosque?
Tap Suggest a Mosque in the Contact section above. Fill in the email template and send it — we verify and add it within 48 hours.
›
❓
Why is my nearest mosque wrong?
Allow location access when the app asks, then tap the 🔄 refresh button on the Locations screen. The app uses two-stage GPS for accuracy — the second reading is more precise.
›
❓
Is this app free? Who built it?
Yes — completely free. DeenLocator is built and maintained by 2now Technology, Abuja. Launched on Eid al-Fitr, 1 Shawwal 1447 AH (20 March 2026).
›

Install DeenLocator
Add to Home Screen for offline access
/* ══ WELCOME SCREEN ══ */ function showWelcomeIfNew(){ try{ var seen = localStorage.getItem('dl_welcomed'); if(!seen){ document.getElementById('welcomeOverlay').classList.add('show'); document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden'; } }catch(e){} } function dismissWelcome(){ try{ localStorage.setItem('dl_welcomed','1'); }catch(e){} var ov = document.getElementById('welcomeOverlay'); if(ov) ov.classList.remove('show'); document.body.style.overflow = ''; /* Request notification permission after welcome */ setTimeout(function(){ if('Notification' in window && Notification.permission === 'default'){ showToast('💡 Tip: Enable notifications for prayer alerts in Settings'); } }, 1500); } function toggleFaq(row){ var answer = row.querySelector('.faq-answer'); var chevron = row.querySelector('.settings-row-right'); if(!answer) return; var isOpen = answer.style.display !== 'none'; document.querySelectorAll('.faq-answer').forEach(function(a){ a.style.display='none'; }); document.querySelectorAll('.settings-row-right').forEach(function(c){ c.textContent='›'; }); if(!isOpen){ answer.style.display='block'; if(chevron) chevron.textContent='⌄'; } }
